command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup && git pull origin main

echo "=== RUNNING PHASE 9E.2 SPEC GENERATOR ==="
echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/phase9e2_gen.py
python3 /tmp/phase9e2_gen.py

echo "=== COMMIT ==="
git add docs/memory-*.md
git status --short | grep memory
git commit -m "Phase 9E.2 Memory Runtime — specification and architecture"

echo "=== TAG ==="
git tag Phase9E2-MemoryRuntimeSpec

echo "=== PUSH ==="
git push origin main && git push origin Phase9E2-MemoryRuntimeSpec
git push github main && git push github Phase9E2-MemoryRuntimeSpec

echo "=== VERIFY ==="
ls docs/memory-*.md
git log --oneline -4
git tag -l | tail -6
